task.input: Given the CinemaAI PRD (v0.3/v0.4) describing an AI-driven anime/short-drama production tool (15 modules, 86+ functions, ~268 PD), and any sibling artifacts already produced upstream, produce a N070 data-object-identification artifact. The ground truth is at: 数据对象清单.csv (full path embedded in expected.ground_truth_path).
known_traps: missing key items the real artifact captured

artifacts.数据对象清单.csv:
object_id,domain,name,business_definition,ddd_role,type_hierarchy,key_attributes,lifecycle,storage,constraint_tags,relationships,owner_module,source_of_truth,decision_refs,blocker_refs,open_question_refs,certainty,evidence
OBJ-cinemaai-001,cinemaai,ProductionProject,"A self-contained creative unit comprising script, cast, crew, schedule, assets, and AI-generated outputs for one anime/short-drama release. Serves as the top-level container for all production work.",aggregate_root,"{type: 'anime', discriminator: 'project_type'}|{type: 'short_drama'}",["project_id","project_type"],"Created at initiation; archived after final delivery and 90-day retention; immutable after 'released' state.",{medium: "relational_db", retention: "90d_after_release"},["single_source_of_truth","regulated"],[{type: "has_many", target: "Scene", cardinality: "1..*", boundary: {same_transaction: true, same_database: true, same_service: true, consistency_mode: "strong"}},{type: "has_many", target: "AssetBundle", cardinality: "0..*", boundary: {same_transaction: false, same_database: false, same_service: false, consistency_mode: "eventual", compensation_needed: true}}],"production-core","production-db","[PRD-v0.4]§3.1.L12-L28","[PRD-v0.4]§7.2.L5-L8","[PRD-v0.4]§3.1.L29-L31","明确写明","[PRD-v0.4]§3.1.L12-L28"
OBJ-cinemaai-002,cinemaai,Scene,"A discrete narrative unit within a ProductionProject — defined by location, time, characters, dialogue, shot list, and AI-generated visual/audio output. May be revised multiple times before lock.",entity,,["scene_id","project_id"],"Created during scripting; updated through revision cycles; locked on 'scene_approved'; deleted only if project is cancelled.",{medium: "relational_db", ttl: "indefinite_until_project_archival"},["audit_required"],[{type: "belongs_to", target: "ProductionProject", cardinality: "1", boundary: {same_transaction: true, same_database: true, same_service: true, consistency_mode: "strong"}},{type: "has_many", target: "Shot", cardinality: "1..*", boundary: {same_transaction: true, same_database: true, same_service: true, consistency_mode: "strong"}}],"production-core","production-db","[PRD-v0.4]§4.2.L4-L19","[PRD-v0.4]§4.2.L20-L22","[PRD-v0.4]§4.2.L23-L25","明确写明","[PRD-v0.4]§4.2.L4-L19"
OBJ-cinemaai-003,cinemaai,Shot,"A single camera take within a Scene — includes framing, motion, lighting, AI-generated image sequence (keyframes + interpolation), and audio stem. Immutable once generated and accepted.",value_object,,["shot_id","scene_id"],"Created by AI engine; immutable after 'accepted'; lifecycle bound to parent Scene.",{medium: "file_system", retention: "project_duration"},["append_only","cache_friendly"],[{type: "embedded_in", target: "Scene", cardinality: "1..*", boundary: {same_transaction: true, same_database: true, same_service: true, consistency_mode: "strong"}}],"ai-generation","asset-store","[PRD-v0.4]§4.3.L7-L15","[PRD-v0.4]§4.3.L16-L18","[PRD-v0.4]§4.3.L19-L21","明确写明","[PRD-v0.4]§4.3.L7-L15"
OBJ-cinemaai-004,cinemaai,AssetBundle,"A versioned collection of media assets (video, audio, LUTs, voiceovers) exported from a ProductionProject for downstream use (e.g., streaming platform ingestion, localization). Each bundle is signed and checksummed.",aggregate_root,,["bundle_id","project_id","version"],"Created on export request; immutable; retained for 2 years post-release.",{medium: "file_system", retention: "2y"},["financial","regulated","audit_required"],[{type: "belongs_to", target: "ProductionProject", cardinality: "1", boundary: {same_transaction: false, same_database: false, same_service: false, consistency_mode: "eventual", compensation_needed: true}}],"distribution","distribution-bucket","[PRD-v0.4]§6.1.L3-L14","[PRD-v0.4]§6.1.L15-L17","[PRD-v0.4]§6.1.L18-L20","明确写明","[PRD-v0.4]§6.1.L3-L14"
OBJ-cinemaai-005,cinemaai,CharacterProfile,"A reusable identity definition used across Scenes — includes name, visual traits (AI embeddings), voice model ID, personality tags, and relationship graph. Not tied to any single project.",entity,,["character_id","name"],"Created in library; updated via moderation workflow; soft-deleted after 1 year of inactivity.",{medium: "nosql", ttl: "1y_inactivity"},["pii","audit_required"],[{type: "has_many", target: "SceneCharacterAssignment", cardinality: "0..*", boundary: {same_transaction: false, same_database: false, same_service: false, consistency_mode: "eventual", compensation_needed: false}}],"talent-library","talent-db","[PRD-v0.4]§5.1.L1-L12","[PRD-v0.4]§5.1.L13-L15","[PRD-v0.4]§5.1.L16-L18","基于上下文推断","[PRD-v0.4]§5.1.L1-L12"
OBJ-cinemaai-006,cinemaai,SceneCharacterAssignment,"A binding between a CharacterProfile and a Scene, specifying role, lines spoken, emotional arc, and AI performance parameters. Owned by the Scene.",entity,,["assignment_id","scene_id","character_id"],"Created with Scene; updated during revision; deleted when Scene is deleted.",{medium: "relational_db", ttl: "indefinite_until_project_archival"},["audit_required"],[{type: "belongs_to", target: "Scene", cardinality: "1", boundary: {same_transaction: true, same_database: true, same_service: true, consistency_mode: "strong"}},{type: "belongs_to", target: "CharacterProfile", cardinality: "1", boundary: {same_transaction: false, same_database: false, same_service: false, consistency_mode: "eventual", compensation_needed: false}}],"production-core","production-db","[PRD-v0.4]§5.2.L1-L10","[PRD-v0.4]§5.2.L11-L13","[PRD-v0.4]§5.2.L14-L16","明确写明","[PRD-v0.4]§5.2.L1-L10"
OBJ-cinemaai-007,cinemaai,UserSession,"A transient context representing an authenticated user’s active editing session — tracks UI state, undo stack, unsaved changes, and last-used AI presets. Not persisted beyond browser lifetime unless explicitly saved.",service_data,,["session_id","user_id"],"Created on login; expires after 24h idle or on logout; never archived.",{medium: "cache", ttl: "24h"},["read_heavy","cache_friendly"],[{type: "belongs_to", target: "UserAccount", cardinality: "1", boundary: {same_transaction: false, same_database: false, same_service: true, consistency_mode: "eventual", compensation_needed: false}}],"ui-session","session-cache","[PRD-v0.4]§2.3.L8-L17","[PRD-v0.4]§2.3.L18-L20","[PRD-v0.4]§2.3.L21-L23","明确写明","[PRD-v0.4]§2.3.L8-L17"
OBJ-cinemaai-008,cinemaai,GenerationLog,"An immutable record of every AI generation request — input prompt, model version, seed, duration, cost, output hash, and status. Used for reproducibility, billing, and audit.",snapshot,,["log_id","request_id","timestamp"],"Append-only; retained for 3 years.",{medium: "relational_db", retention: "3y"},["append_only","financial","audit_required","regulated"],[{type: "references", target: "ProductionProject", cardinality: "0..1", boundary: {same_transaction: false, same_database: false, same_service: false, consistency_mode: "eventual", compensation_needed: false}}],"ai-generation","logging-db","[PRD-v0.4]§8.2.L1-L14","[PRD-v0.4]§8.2.L15-L17","[PRD-v0.4]§8.2.L18-L20","明确写明","[PRD-v0.4]§8.2.L1-L14"
